concept:
Tested 4 ? Patient presents with
pain on passive movement
pallor
poikilothermia
paresthesias
paralysis
pulselessness. Treatment?
Suspicion:Compartment syndrome
Treatment:All compartment fasciotomy
Back pain that is:
exacerbated by standing
exacerbated by walking
relieved by sitting
relieved by hyperflexion of the hips is: Spinal stenosis
Joints in the hand affected in rheumatoid arthritis (RA):
Metacarpophalangeal (MCP) joints
PIP joints
DIP joints are spared
Joint pain and stiffness that worsen over the course of the day and is relieved by rest: Osteoarthritis
Genetic disorder associated with multiple fractures and commonly mistaken for child abuse is: Osteogenesis imperfecta
Hip and back pain along with stiffness that improves with activity over the course of the day and worsens at rest. Diagnostic test?
Suspicion:Ankylosing Spondylitis
Confirm with:HLA-B27
Young man presents with:
arthritis
conjunctivitis
urethritis What is his condition and what are the associated organisms? Patient probably has Reiter's arthritis. Organisms are:
Campylobacter
Shigella
Salmonella
Chlamydia
Ureaplasma
A 55 year-old man has sudden, excruciating first metatarsophalangeal (MTP) joint pain after a night of drinking red wine. Diagnosis, workup and chronic treatment?
Diagnosis:Gout
Confirm with: Needle-shaped negatively birefringent crystals seen on join fluid aspirate
Treatment: Chronic treatment with allopurinol and probenecid
Rhomboid-shaped, positively birefringent crystals on joint fluid aspirate indicate: Pseudogout
Elderly man complains of bony pain; he mentions frontal bossing and adds that his favorite hat no longer fits. This indicates: Paget's disease
Patient:
is Elderly
is female
with pain
with stiffness of the shoulders and hips
who cannot lift her arms above her head
who's labs show anemia
who's labs show elevated ESR indicating: Polymyalgia rheumatica
Active 13 year-old boy has anterior knee pain. Diagnosis? Osgood-Schlatter
The bone fractured in a fall on an outstretched hand: Distal radius (Colles' fracture)
Complication of scaphoid fracture is: Avascular necrosis (AVN)
Signs suggesting radial nerve damage with humeral fracture:
Wrist drop
Loss of thumb abduction
Patient:
is young child
with proximal muscle weakness
with waddling gait
pronounced calf muscles indicating: Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD)
Patient:
is first-born
is female
was born in breech position
was found to have asymmetric skin folds on her newborn exam Diagnosis? Treatment?
Diagnosis:Developmental hip dysplasia
Treatment:If severe, consider Pavlik harness to maintain abduction </table
An 11 year-old obese, African American boy presents with sudden onset of limp. Diagnosis? Workup?
Diagnosis: Slipped capital femoral epiphyses
Confirm with: AP and frog leg lateral view
What is the most common primary malignant tumor of bone? Multiple myeloma
Xerostomia with paratoid enlargement and anti-LLa antibodies indicates: Sjogren's syndrome
Joint pain associated with a heliotropic rash around the eyelids indicates: Dermatomyositis
What are the small vessel vasculitides?
Wegener's granulomatosis
Henoch-Schonlein purpura (HSP)
What are the medium vessel vasculitides?
Churg-Strauss
Polyarteritis nodosa
What are the large vessel vasculitides?
Temporal arteritis
Takayasu's arteritis
Patient:
with palpable purpura
with abdominal pain
with asymmetric periarticular swelling indicating: Henoch-Schonlein purpura (HSP)
Patient:
is 45 year old
is female
with calcinosis
with Raynaud's phenomenon
with esophageal dysmotility
with sclerodactyly
with telangiectasis indicating: CREST syndrome of scleroderma
Most specific SLE antibodies are:
Anti-Sm
anti-dsDNA
Anticentromere antibodies indicate: Scleroderma
Antihistone antibodies indicate: Drug-induced SLE
Anti-La (SSB) antibodies indicate: Sjogren's syndrome
c-ANCA is a test for: Wegener's granulomatosis
p-ANCA is a test for: Polyarteritis nodosa
Sarcoma associated with "onion skinning" is: Ewing's sarcoma
Sarcoma associated with "sunburst" pattern is: Osteosarcoma
Radiographic "bamboo spine" indicates: Ankylosing Spondylitis
